name: Report_Generator

documentation.description:
| PURPOSE
| Report_Generator supports the manipulation of a report file that is
| supplemented by a table of contents file.  Both files are automatically
| created when the Report_Generator comes into existence (it is up to
| the user to remember to close them when done via the Close_Files method).
| The user may then add lines to the report file with line wrapping and
| use the other methods associated with the Report_Generator.
|
| The appearance of a page in the report file or table of contents file
| is as follows:
|                ---------------------------------
|                | <Top_Margin blank lines>      |
|                | <Page_Header_Line (centered)> |
|                | <blank line>                  |
|                | <first line of text body>     |
|                |                               |
|                |      ... <body> ...           |
|                |                               |
|                | <last line of text body>      |
|                | <blank line>                  |
|                | <page number (centered)>      |
|                | <blank lines>                 |
|                ---------------------------------
|
| The number of blank lines at the bottom of a page is the number
| of total lines on the page minus the value of Bottom_Margin.  The
| number of lines in the body of the page is the value of the
| Bottom_Margin minus the value of the Top_Margin minus 4.
|
| AUTHOR
| Richard Conn   1.0   26 Mar 96  Initial design

| PURPOSE
| Close both the report file and the table of contents file.
|
| EXCEPTIONS
|   FILE_WRITE_ERROR - raised if an error occurs, such as disk space
|                      filling up

| PURPOSE
| Create and initialize the report file and the table of contents file.
|
| EXCEPTIONS
|   FILE_CREATION_ERROR - raised if one or both files cannot be created

| PURPOSE
| Force a page eject in either the report file or the table of contents file.
|
| EXCEPTIONS
|   FILE_WRITE_ERROR - raised if an error occurs, such as disk space
|                      filling up

| PURPOSE
| Force a page eject in either the report file or the table of contents file.
|
| EXCEPTIONS
|   FILE_WRITE_ERROR - raised if an error occurs, such as disk space
|                      filling up

subprograms.name: Put_Line_to_Contents_File

documentation.description:
| PURPOSE
| Add a line to the table of contents file.  If Center_the_Line is TRUE,
| center the line on the page.  If Append_Page_Number is TRUE, place the
| page number of the current page in the report file onto the end of the
| line, right-justified.  If Append_Page_Number is TRUE, the
| Center_the_Line flag is ignored and the line is always left-justified.
|
| EXCEPTIONS
|   FILE_WRITE_ERROR - raised if an error occurs, such as disk space
|                      filling up

subprograms.name: Put_Line_to_Report_File

documentation.description:
| PURPOSE
| Add a line to the report file.  If Indent_by is non-zero, reduce the
| Left_Margin setting for this line by this amount.  If Indent_by is
| greater than the Left_Margin, the Left_Margin will be set to zero.
| If Center_the_Line is TRUE, the line will be centered, if possible.
|
| EXCEPTIONS
|   FILE_WRITE_ERROR - raised if an error occurs, such as disk space
|                      filling up
